tools.name: find_cosy_hotels
tools.description: Find live, cosy-scored hotels from Got Cosy's cosiness index (gotcosy.com): hotels scored 0-10 for warmth, intimacy and character from photos and reviews. Only returns hotels that clear the public floor (score 5.0+). Optionally filter by city, country and a minimum cosy score.

tools.name: get_hotel_feeling
tools.description: Get one hotel's cosy score, evidence signals and description from Got Cosy, by its slug (as returned in find_cosy_hotels' results, or from a gotcosy.com/en/hotels/<slug> URL). Below-floor hotels return {below_bar:true} with no score exposed.
